title: Browser page context bridge
goal: Collect current page, drawer and selection context in the browser without scraping raw HTML.
requirements: Read data-ai-context from the current page and active drawer/selection.
Update context after HTMX swaps and drawer open/close.
Publish sanitized snapshots to the backend and track returned context_version.
Send updates only when sanitized context hash changes.
Debounce filter/search driven updates by 250-500 ms.
Use CSRF/session auth and stay within max payload limits.
Do not collect arbitrary visible text from the DOM.
acceptance: Opening a workorder drawer changes selection to that workorder.
Closing the drawer clears selection or falls back to page-level context.
HTMX board refresh does not leave stale selected object context.
Sidebar chat can read current window_id/context_version before submit.
Rapid filter/search changes do not create an excessive update request stream.
